calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Nov-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Receipts For Funds Deposited Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for and with Saudia Merritt.

The Court stated that the receipts have been filed, that there is a discrepancy between what was on hand and what was paid out and asked where the additional funds came from. Mr. Cowan reported that there were two other accounts, a CD and a savings account, that they did not include bank statements as it was all encapsulated in the estate account and that there is nothing else remaining. The Court stated that the original issue was the transfer of funds. Ms. Merritt stated that the funds were put back into the estate account, that she needed funds in her account but transferred them back. The Court stated that it triggers a red flag when things do not balance. Mr. Cowan stated that there have been no distributions, that distribution and waiver of accounting is coming next, that the would like to distribute ASAP and that within 10 days they will file for final distribution and waiver of account. Status on filing the petition for final distribution is set for October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, and the status on filing receipts into a blocked account is taken off calendar.

Mr. Cowan was told in court that October 19, 2015 would be his hearing date for the petition for final distribution, however, a message was left for Mr. Cowan on voicemail stating that the actual hearing date would be whatever date is assigned by the filing clerk.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Receipts For Funds Deposited Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Sep-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan (via court call) for Saudia Merritt.

Mr. Cowan reported that he filed the receipt of deposit, that the administrator used funds to pay the mortgage and HOA fees, that they are trying to conserve the money to pay taxes, that they are preparing an informal accounting for the heirs and that they do not expect objections to it. The Court stated that there is a discrepancy, that the numbers do not balance. Mr. Cowan stated that the mortgage is in excess of $3000.00 per month, that they had to make repairs to the property prior to sale, that they have the receipts and that the estate was in arrears at the time of death. The Court stated that it wants all receipts filed within a week, that if all balances they can continue on and that if receipts are not filed or do not balance it will consider suspending the powers of the administrator. Mr. Cowan stated that he is currently on vacation and asked for a longer continuance. The Court stated that it is suspending the powers of the administrator until 9/14/15, that if everything balances the powers will be reinstated and if not the court will require a formal accounting. Mr. Cowan stated that all funds are in blocked accounts. The Court stated that there are substantial amounts not accounted for, that the receipts are mandatory, that an informal accounting and as much information that can be provided would be helpful and clarified that original receipts are preferred but copies will be accepted. The status of filing receipts into a blocked account was continued to 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (259 Bayview Circle S.F.)
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for Saudia Merritt.

The sale was confirmed at $550,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required. Status of filing receipts for funds deposited into a blocked account is set for August 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Park. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Reconsideration Of Fee Waiver
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Reconsideration Of Fee Waiver
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Continued To Oct-23-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for Saudia Merritt.

The Court informed Counsel that the Court fees need to be paid. Mr. Cowan stated that there are no creditors. The Court stated that it can not give full powers without bond but that it can give limited powers. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan for and with (petitioner) Saudia Merritt.

Mr. Cowan & Ms. Merritt stated that the mortgage is not up to date, $15,000.00 plus the payment for this month is outstanding. The balance in the Bank of America account is $57,000.00, possibly more and they are unable to access the money. The court addressed the defects in the petition, specifically publication of the amended petition. Mr. Cowan will file an ex parte petition to continue the special administration. The petition for letters of administration was continued to September 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
